desc.desc: Deal Wind damage to all foes equal to 42.8% of Attack. 23.8% chance to inflict Windswept for 2 turns.
24.5% chance to inflict Dizzy on 1 foe for 2 turns.
Deal Wind damage to all foes equal to 45.6% of Attack. 25.3% chance to inflict Windswept for 2 turns.
Deal Curse damage to all foes equal to 19.4% of Attack. Low chance to deal Curse insta-kill effect to foes with 50% or less HP. Increase chance based on foe's missing HP.
Deal Psy damage to all foes equal to 54.4% of Attack. Deal a Technical and increase damage by 40% for foes with a spiritual ailment.

tutorial.title: Unique Shadow Abilities
tutorial.content:
Shadows have different weaknesses and resistances than normal.
1. When a summoned <color=#FF423F>Narcissus</color> takes an attack, it loses 1 <color=#FF423F>Shackles of Reflection</color> stack. When all of its Shackles of Reflection stacks are removed, the summoned Narcissus will be KO'd.
2. When a summoned Narcissus is defeated, Narcissus recovers 50% of its max HP.
3. At the end of Narcissus's turn, if a summoned Narcissus is present, Narcissus will use <color=#FF423F>Dazzler</color>, which has a chance to inflict 1 random Phantom Thief with Dizzy.

desc.desc: High chance to inflict Rage on 1 foe for 1 turn.
Decrease all foes' Defense by 20.3% for 3 turns.
Deal Fire damage to all foes equal to 39.8% of Attack. 22.1% chance to inflict Burn for 2 turns.
Deal set amount of damage based on current HP to all foes. Also, inflict Despair for 3 turns.

tutorial.title: Unique Shadow Abilities
tutorial.content:
1. If Cerberus takes damage 3 times in 1 turn, it will be replaced by Orthus.
2. Orthrus has an effect that decreases final damage. When it takes an attack, it counterattacks with <color=#FF423F>Double Fangs</color>, increasing the Phantom Thief's final damage taken. At the end of Orthrus's turn, it is replaced by Cerberus.
3. Each time Cerberus is replaced, <color=#FF423F>Guard Dog's Gaze</color> is gained. When Cerberus has 3 Guard Dog's Gaze stacks, at the start of its turn, it uses <color=#FF423F>Abyssal Gaze</color>, <color=#FF423F>inflicting all Phantom Thieves with Despair</color>.
4. When Cerberus inflicts a spiritual ailment on a Phantom Thief, they become permanently inflicted with <color=#FF423F>Unease</color>. Unease does not stack, and can be removed with healing skills. If 2 or more Phantom Thieves are inflicted with Unease, at the start of Cerberus's turn, its HP will be fully restored. If 4 or more Phantom Thieves are inflicted with Unease, at the start of Orthrus's turn, it will deal a set amount of damage based on its max HP.
